title: coreopsis suaveolens
intro: Coreopsis suaveolens, also known as the pink coreopsis or velvet coreopsis, is a flowering plant species belonging to the aster family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Coreopsis suaveolens can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
